input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.13.2.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:

D.13.2.3 The vehicle will then compete in the Endurance event, refer to D.12.5

final_answer: The vehicle will then compete in the Endurance event, refer to D.12.5
